content.en:
Silver Horn Source Family.

After Yin Ren returned, he immediately asked to see a supreme member of the Silver Horn Source Clan, who was also the ancestor of his lineage.

"Meet the Ancestor!"

Silver Ren respectfully bowed to the Supreme One, Silver Eagle Source Shinto.

"Yinren, what are you looking for me?" said Yinying Yuanshen lightly.

Yin Ren immediately said: "Ancestor, I heard that an invincible person has an Eternal Soul Bead on his body, and I want to trade that Eternal Soul Bead, but the other party's request is one-twentieth of the Silver and Bronze Beads of the Eternal Source of our Clan's Zhen Clan. "

"That invincible person dares to covet the things of my clan!"

The Silver Eagle Source God said angrily.

Immediately, he proposed, "Yinren, you tell me who the invincible is, and I'll kill him!"

Yin Ren hurriedly said: "Old Ancestor, I don't know who the other party is, but you'd better not offend him, he is a Void God Son!"

Son of the Void!

The expression of the Silver Eagle Source God changed, the Son of the Void was already very demonic, and the Son of the Void was even more terrifying, he had heard of the achievements of a Void Divine Son, that was called terrifying, it was simply unstoppable.

The Silver Horn Source Clan can't afford to offend a Void God Son at the moment, otherwise there is a danger of extinction in the future.

Yin Ren hurriedly pleaded: "Ancestor, this time is my great opportunity, if I can obtain the Eternal Soul Bead and improve my soul qualification, I must have a great hope of becoming a second-class invincible, or even a first-class invincible, and when the time comes, with the help of the Zhen Clan's Eternal Source Silver and Bronze Beads, I can easily become a supreme being." I am a child of the void, and if I become a supreme being, my strength will definitely surpass that of other supreme beings, which is enough to greatly enhance the strength of the Silver Horn Source Clan. "

The Silver Eagle Source God was silent for a long time before he said, "Silver Ren, this is a big matter, I need to discuss it with several other supreme beings in the clan, if they also agree, then we will agree." Rest assured, I will try my best to convince the other Supremes, but you will have to pay some price. "

"I understand that I am willing to bear any price!"

Yin Ren said.

Subsequently, the Silver Eagle Source God met with several supreme beings of the Silver Horn Source Clan and discussed the matter of Silver Ren.

"I want Silver Ren to exchange one-twentieth of the Silver and Bronze Bead Origin for an Eternal Soul Bead, what do you think?"

"I don't agree, this is too risky, once one-twentieth of the origin of the silver and copper beads is consumed, it will take a long time to make up for it, and we even need to pay a lot of resources to restore the silver and copper beads. "

"Yes, I don't agree either, what if Yin Ren fails? Besides, there is more than one clansman in the clan who urgently needs the Eternal Soul Bead, so why do you have to give Silver Ren. "

"Just because Silver Ren is the son of the Void, if Silver Ren breaks through to the Supreme Realm, it will be a great thing for our clan, and it will greatly enhance our strength. "

After some discussion, the other supreme beings of the Silver Horn Source Clan finally agreed.

However, they also made several requirements for Yinren.

First, in the future, the rapid restoration of the origin of silver and copper beads, Yinren needs to bear ninety percent.

Second, after Yinren breaks through to the supreme realm in the future, he will need to sit at least one million yuan of the Silver Horn Source Clan.

This is also to prevent Silver Tenacy from running around, in case it falls in a forbidden place, or in order to improve its strength, it never comes back, then wouldn't the Silver Horn Source Clan waste resources cultivating Silver Tenacy in vain?

There is also a third point, after Yin Ren breaks through to the supreme one, he must accept one from the clan as his personal disciple, and do his best to cultivate him, and strive to cultivate another supreme one.

I have to say that the conditions put forward by several supreme beings are too harsh.

But there is no way, the origin of silver and copper beads can be refined by the clansmen, but if it is traded to outsiders, this is the first time.

That's why they are so opposed and put forward such harsh conditions.

After hearing these conditions, Yin Ren was also very annoyed, but for the sake of the Eternal Soul Bead, he still agreed.

Thereupon.

Several Supreme Beings extracted one-twentieth of the origin and handed it to Yin Ren, so that Yin Ren took these silver and copper bead origins to the Void Source Hall and traded with Ye Tian.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian and Yin Ren met again.

"Our clan has agreed, let's start trading!"

Silver Ren said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out the Eternal Soul Bead, while Yin Ren took out the Silver and Copper Bead Origin.

Under the witness of the Void Source Palace's Instrument Spirit, Ye Tian and Yin Ren completed the transaction.

After the transaction was completed, Yin Ren asked, "Do you have a second soul bead in your hand, and our Silver Horn Source Clan is willing to continue trading with you." "

This is also the request of the supreme beings in the clan, if they can obtain the second Eternal Soul Bead, they are willing to give up another twentieth of the origin of the silver and copper beads.

"No!" Ye Tian explained: "I just killed a strong enemy to get this Eternal Soul Bead on his body, and I happen to know that your Silver Horn Source Clan may need the Eternal Soul Bead, and I need the Silver and Bronze Bead Origin, so I will trade with you." "

He wouldn't really continue to trade with the Silver Horn Origin Ancestor, because he only needed these Silver and Copper Bead Origins, and if there were more, it would be useless.

And the Eternal Soul Bead is very valuable, but it is not only needed by the Silver Horn Source Clan.

He is not stupid, so naturally he will not take out the second Eternal Soul Bead.

"That's it!"

Silver Ren whispered.

Maybe what Ye Tian said was true, maybe it was false, but he couldn't prove it, so he had to stop there.

Anyway, he got an Eternal Soul Orb, and the others didn't care too much.

Subsequently, Silver Ren left.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, took the silver and copper bead origin into his cultivation space, and immediately copied the silver body.

He wants to study the flesh of the Silver Horn Source Clan, looking for the special particles in the body, just like studying the soul fit.

He'd already found a way anyway, so the research shouldn't take too long.

Really.

It only took three dark time to study the special flesh particles that could fit with the origin of the silver and copper beads, and used the duplicate body to study how to derive these special flesh particles again and again, so it took another five dark time to successfully research.

this day.

Ye Tian began to let the flesh particles of his body begin to evolve into special flesh particles that fit the origin of the silver and copper beads, and it took some time for the evolution to be successful.

In this way, Ye Tian's body can also be 100% in line with the origin of silver and copper beads.

Then, Ye Tian took out the origin of the silver and copper beads.

"Absorb!"

Ye Tian's flesh began to absorb the origin of the silver and copper beads without any barrier.

As Ye Tian's physical body continued to absorb the origin of silver and copper beads, his physical body became stronger and stronger.

In the end, the origin of the silver and copper beads was absorbed by Ye Tian, and his physical body also improved a lot, and his strength increased again.
